rationale: Both reviews surface the same real scope violations grounded in the diff (bundled smoothness at AffineAlgGroup, naive IsUnipotent def at line 51, vacuous True stubs at ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup); acting on either produces the same non-stub, correctly-scoped merged result (split or defer classes, drop IsUnipotent stubs). Review 1's AlgPoints nit and Review 2's 'remove everything until Layer 0-5' differ only on degree of deferral, not a material scope distinction a maintainer would insist distinguishes the outcomes.
